**🏷️ PR Title**: <!--
Conventional Commits format. This becomes the squash-merge commit message,
so it MUST follow the same convention as commits in CLAUDE.md (semver
mapping: feat → minor, fix/perf → patch, `!` or BREAKING CHANGE → major).

Format:  `<type>(<scope>): <description> #<task-id>`
Types:   feat | fix | perf | refactor | docs | test | chore | style | ci | build
Length:  under 70 characters; use the body/description for the rest.

Example: feat(live-session): add text-only conversation mode #86exr424h
-->
